requirements.task_name: Create a 5-article beginner mindfulness reading list with 5–10 minute articles from the last 12 months
requirements.task_description: Build a reading list named 'Week 1 Mindfulness' that contains exactly 5 articles tagged 'Mindfulness Basics', each with a reading time between 5–10 minutes and published within the last 12 months.

required_variables.set_condition: On every call to getArticlesList (overwrite previous value).
required_variables.value_to_set: An object capturing the last-used filters: { topic, content_type, tag, min_reading_time, max_reading_time, sort, page, page_size, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }.
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to see what article filters and sort the user actually used, and check that they attempted to filter for 'Mindfulness Basics' with a 5–10 minute reading-time window and 'Newest First' sorting.

required_variables.set_condition: If getArticlesList is called with topic normalized to 'mindfulness basics', min_reading_time === 5, max_reading_time === 10, and sort === 'newest_first'. Once set to true it should not be reset to false.
required_variables.reason: Explicitly records that the user has at least once used the exact filter configuration required by the task, independent of other article list calls.

requirements.task_name: Build a 3-track evening sleep meditation playlist with 12–18 minute sessions rated 4.5+ stars
requirements.task_description: Create an audio playlist named 'Evening Wind Down' with 3 guided meditations in the Sleep category, each 12–18 minutes long and rated at least 4.5 stars, choosing the three shortest tracks that match these criteria.

required_variables.set_condition: On every call to getMeditationTracksList (overwrite previous value).
required_variables.value_to_set: An object capturing the last-used filters: { category, min_duration, max_duration, min_rating, sort, page, page_size, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }.
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to see which category, duration range, rating threshold, and sort order were actually used when viewing meditations.

required_variables.set_condition: If getMeditationTracksList is called with category normalized to 'sleep', min_duration === 12, max_duration === 18, min_rating >= 4.5, and sort === 'duration_shortest_first'. Once set to true it should not be reset to false.
required_variables.reason: Records that the user has used a filter configuration consistent with the task (Sleep, 12–18 minutes, rating ≥4.5, sorted by shortest duration).

requirements.task_name: Bookmark the 3 most recent full moon ritual guides into a 'Moon Rituals' collection
requirements.task_description: Find content about full moon rituals, filter to 'Guides' only, and save the 3 most recently published guides into a collection named 'Moon Rituals'.

required_variables.set_condition: On every call to searchSiteContent (overwrite previous value).
required_variables.value_to_set: An object capturing the last search: { query, content_types, sort, page, page_size, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }.
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to inspect what query, content-type filter, and sort order were actually used on search.

required_variables.set_condition: If searchSiteContent is called with query trimmed and lowercased equal to 'full moon ritual', content_types includes 'guide', and sort === 'newest_first'. Once true, do not reset to false.
required_variables.reason: Confirms that the user performed a search with the exact criteria required: search term 'full moon ritual', filter to guides, and newest-first sorting.

requirements.task_name: Complete a 10-question stress self-assessment quiz and record the result in the journal
requirements.task_description: Finish the 'Stress Check-in (10 questions)' quiz by selecting the first available answer for each question, then create a journal entry that includes the overall stress level label shown on the results page and the current date in the title.

requirements.task_name: Register for the next evening 'Breathwork for Anxiety' workshop starting at or after 6:00 PM within the next 30 days
requirements.task_description: Find an upcoming live workshop titled 'Breathwork for Anxiety' that starts at 6:00 PM or later and occurs within the next 30 days, then complete the on-site reservation form with provided details.

required_variables.set_condition: On every call to getEventsList (overwrite previous value).
required_variables.value_to_set: An object capturing the last event filters: { keyword, start_date, end_date, time_of_day_segment, sort, page, page_size, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }.
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to see what keyword, date range, time-of-day segment, and sort the user actually used when listing events.

required_variables.set_condition: If getEventsList is called with: (a) keyword containing 'breathwork for anxiety' (case-insensitive substring), (b) start_date equal to today's date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' form, (c) end_date equal to today + 30 days in 'YYYY-MM-DD' form, (d) time_of_day_segment === 'evening', and (e) sort === 'soonest_date_first'. Once true, never reset to false.
required_variables.reason: Confirms that the user executed an event search with the task’s exact constraints before registering.

requirements.task_name: Create a 'Morning Self-Compassion' affirmation set with 5 affirmations scheduled for 7:00 AM daily
requirements.task_description: Select exactly 5 affirmations tagged 'Self-Compassion', save them into a new set called 'Morning Self-Compassion', and schedule that set to appear daily at 7:00 AM using the on-site scheduling controls.

required_variables.set_condition: On every call to getAffirmationsList (overwrite previous value).
required_variables.value_to_set: An object capturing the last affirmation filters: { tag, page, page_size, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }.
required_variables.reason: Shows which tag was actually used when listing affirmations.

required_variables.set_condition: If getAffirmationsList is called with tag that normalizes (case/spacing/hyphen insensitive) to 'self compassion' (e.g., 'Self-Compassion'). Once true, never reset to false.
required_variables.reason: Confirms that the user filtered affirmations by the 'Self-Compassion' tag as required before building the set.

requirements.task_name: Join an easy 3-day digital detox challenge starting next Monday
requirements.task_description: Locate a 'Digital Detox' challenge with a duration of 3 days and difficulty level 'Easy', then join it and set the start date to the upcoming Monday using the challenge start date picker.

required_variables.set_condition: On every call to getChallengesList (overwrite previous value).
required_variables.value_to_set: An object capturing the last challenge filters: { tag, duration_days, difficulty, sort, page, page_size, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }.
required_variables.reason: Allows inspection of which tag, duration, difficulty, and sort were used when listing challenges.

required_variables.set_condition: If getChallengesList is called with tag that normalizes to 'digital detox', duration_days === 3, difficulty === 'easy', and sort is either 'most_popular' or 'recommended'. Once true, do not reset to false.
required_variables.reason: Confirms that the user narrowed the challenge list exactly as specified in the task prior to joining.

requirements.task_name: Select a higher-rated beginner evening yoga sequence of at least 20 minutes and add it to 'Today’s Practice'
requirements.task_description: Compare the first two beginner evening yoga sequences that are at least 20 minutes long, identify which has the higher average user rating, and add that one to the 'Today’s Practice' plan.

required_variables.set_condition: On every call to getPracticesList (overwrite previous value).
required_variables.value_to_set: An object capturing the last practice filters: { difficulty, intention, min_duration, max_duration, sort, page, page_size, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }.
required_variables.reason: Shows which difficulty, intention (time-of-day), duration range, and sort order the user actually used.

required_variables.set_condition: If getPracticesList is called with difficulty === 'beginner', intention === 'evening', min_duration === 20 (or >= 20), and sort is either 'top_rated' or 'most_popular'. Once set to true, do not reset to false.
required_variables.reason: Confirms that the user filtered to beginner, evening practices of at least 20 minutes with an appropriate rating-based ordering.

required_variables.set_condition: After getPracticesList has computed and paginated the results, when the filters match the task conditions (same condition as task8_correctPracticeFilterUsed) and the returned items array has at least two entries.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object: { practice_ids: [items[0].id, items[1].id], timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }.
required_variables.reason: Records which two practices were at the top of the correctly filtered list so the evaluator can later ensure that these are the ones the user compared and chose between.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getPracticeDetail(practiceId) is called and practiceId is included in task8_firstTwoPracticeIds.practice_ids, add it to a unique list (up to two IDs).
required_variables.value_to_set: An object of the form { compared_ids: [/* unique practice ids, max 2 */], timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }.
required_variables.reason: Confirms that the user actually opened/viewed the detail pages for the first two practices in the filtered list before selecting the higher-rated one for Today's Practice.
